items.caption: A graphic design with two main elements: a red lego logo on the left and a large, stylized text on the right that reads "the lego movie videogame" in bold, white letters with a three-dimensional effect. the background is black, which contrasts with the bright colors of the lego logo and the text, making them stand out prominently. the overall style of the image suggests it is promotional material for a video game based on the lego movie franchise.
